untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific data (implied volatility levels, option strikes, expiration dates, and simultaneous multi-leg option orders) which are not available in the provided indicator set. The backtest engine appears to be designed for spot price and technical indicators only, not derivatives trading strategies. Options Greeks, IV term structure, and options order execution cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, position data, and bar properties).
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_383 is an options volatility arbitrage strategy (calendar spread / volatility dispersion trade) that requires: (1) real-time implied volatility data for multiple options, (2) strike and expiration selection logic, (3) simultaneous multi-leg order execution, and (4) position management across different expirations. None of these capabilities exist in the provided technical indicator framework. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to be extended with an options module including IV surface data, Greeks calculations, and multi-leg order support.
